metadata.description: User evaluation stimuli for Ghost Touch haptic pipeline
metadata.part1_description: 3AFC semantic alignment: match text to correct haptic profile
metadata.part2_description: Baseline comparison: rank pipeline vs rule-based vs random

families.name: COLD/ICE
families.excerpt: The room went ice cold, like walking into a freezer. The kind of chill that sinks into your bones and doesn't leave even after you step away.

families.name: ABSENCE/VOID
families.excerpt: It felt like nothing was there but something was missing—like a hole in the air where a person should be. An empty shape pressing against you.

families.name: ELECTRICITY/STATIC
families.excerpt: A cluster of energy hovering just above the skin, like sparks jumping between fingertips. The hair on my arms stood straight up.

families.name: MIST/AIR/SMOKE
families.excerpt: A gentle breeze passed through the room though all windows were closed, like walking through fog. It moved around me slowly, then was gone.

families.name: PRESSURE/FORCE
families.excerpt: Sudden pressure on my chest, like an invisible hand pressing down hard. It held me there for a few seconds before lifting.

families.name: WATER/LIQUID
families.excerpt: It felt like something warm and liquid was flowing down my arm, though nothing was there. A smooth, slow trickle from shoulder to fingertips.

families.name: TEMPERATURE_CHANGE
families.excerpt: The air shifted from normal to burning hot in seconds, then back to cold. Like waves of heat and chill rolling through the space.

families.name: TINGLING/PRICKLING
families.excerpt: Tiny pinpricks crawling up my spine, like static electricity dancing on my skin. Not painful, but impossible to ignore.

families.name: VIBRATION/PULSE
families.excerpt: A deep, rhythmic pulsing that I felt in my chest, like a heartbeat that wasn't mine. It came in steady waves, then stopped.

families.name: FABRIC/VEIL/COBWEB
families.excerpt: Something gossamer-thin brushed across my face, like walking through an invisible cobweb. So light I almost didn't notice it.

part1_trials.excerpt: A gentle breeze passed through the room though all windows were closed, like walking through fog. It moved around me slowly, then was gone.
part1_trials.excerpt_zh: 明明所有窗户都关着，房间里却掠过一阵轻柔的风，像穿行在雾里。它在皮肤上留下微凉而潮湿的触感，几秒后便悄然消散。

part1_trials.excerpt: A deep, rhythmic pulsing that I felt in my chest, like a heartbeat that wasn't mine. It came in steady waves, then stopped.
part1_trials.excerpt_zh: 我胸口深处传来一种低沉而有节律的搏动，像一颗不属于我的心脏在跳。它一波一波稳定袭来，每一下都在我全身回荡震颤。

part1_trials.excerpt: The air shifted from normal to burning hot in seconds, then back to cold. Like waves of heat and chill rolling through the space.
part1_trials.excerpt_zh: 空气在短短几秒内从平常骤然变得灼热滚烫，接着又迅速转冷。像一阵阵热浪与寒意轮番冲刷全身，每一次转换都尖锐而分明。

part1_trials.excerpt: A cluster of energy hovering just above the skin, like sparks jumping between fingertips. The hair on my arms stood straight up.
part1_trials.excerpt_zh: 一团能量悬停在皮肤上方，仿佛火花在指尖之间跳跃。手臂上的汗毛一下子都竖了起来，还有一种强烈的嗡鸣感，几乎像电流掠过般酥麻震颤。

part1_trials.excerpt: Tiny pinpricks crawling up my spine, like static electricity dancing on my skin. Not painful, but impossible to ignore.
part1_trials.excerpt_zh: 细小如针刺般的麻点沿着我的脊背一路往上爬，像静电在皮肤上跳舞。不算疼，却让人根本无法忽视——那股挥之不去的酥麻持续不停。

part1_trials.excerpt: The room went ice cold, like walking into a freezer. The kind of chill that sinks into your bones and doesn't leave even after you step away.
part1_trials.excerpt_zh: 整个房间一下子冷得像冰窖，仿佛迎面走进了冷冻库。那种寒意直往骨头里钻，冷得手指都发麻。

part1_trials.excerpt: A gentle breeze passed through the room though all windows were closed, like walking through fog. It moved around me slowly, then was gone.
part1_trials.excerpt_zh: 明明所有窗户都关着，房间里却掠过一阵轻柔的风，像穿行在雾里。它在皮肤上留下微凉而潮湿的触感，几秒后便悄然消散。

part1_trials.excerpt: A cluster of energy hovering just above the skin, like sparks jumping between fingertips. The hair on my arms stood straight up.
part1_trials.excerpt_zh: 一团能量悬停在皮肤上方，仿佛火花在指尖之间跳跃。手臂上的汗毛一下子都竖了起来，还有一种强烈的嗡鸣感，几乎像电流掠过般酥麻震颤。

part1_trials.excerpt: A deep, rhythmic pulsing that I felt in my chest, like a heartbeat that wasn't mine. It came in steady waves, then stopped.
part1_trials.excerpt_zh: 我胸口深处传来一种低沉而有节律的搏动，像一颗不属于我的心脏在跳。它一波一波稳定袭来，每一下都在我全身回荡震颤。

part1_trials.excerpt: The air shifted from normal to burning hot in seconds, then back to cold. Like waves of heat and chill rolling through the space.
part1_trials.excerpt_zh: 空气在短短几秒内从平常骤然变得灼热滚烫，接着又迅速转冷。像一阵阵热浪与寒意轮番冲刷全身，每一次转换都尖锐而分明。

part1_trials.excerpt: Tiny pinpricks crawling up my spine, like static electricity dancing on my skin. Not painful, but impossible to ignore.
part1_trials.excerpt_zh: 细小如针刺般的麻点沿着我的脊背一路往上爬，像静电在皮肤上跳舞。不算疼，却让人根本无法忽视——那股挥之不去的酥麻持续不停。

part1_trials.excerpt: It felt like nothing was there but something was missing—like a hole in the air where a person should be. An empty shape pressing against you.
part1_trials.excerpt_zh: 感觉那里明明什么都没有，却又像缺失了什么——仿佛空气中有一个本该站着人的空洞。那是一种空茫而中空的异样感，好像那片空间本身有重量，却没有实体。

part1_trials.excerpt: Something gossamer-thin brushed across my face, like walking through an invisible cobweb. So light I almost didn't notice it.
part1_trials.excerpt_zh: 有什么薄如蝉翼的东西轻轻掠过我的脸，像一头撞进了看不见的蛛网。轻得让我几乎怀疑自己是否真的感觉到了，但那丝发痒的痕迹却迟迟不散。

part1_trials.excerpt: It felt like nothing was there but something was missing—like a hole in the air where a person should be. An empty shape pressing against you.
part1_trials.excerpt_zh: 感觉那里明明什么都没有，却又像缺失了什么——仿佛空气中有一个本该站着人的空洞。那是一种空茫而中空的异样感，好像那片空间本身有重量，却没有实体。

part1_trials.excerpt: Sudden pressure on my chest, like an invisible hand pressing down hard. It held me there for a few seconds before lifting.
part1_trials.excerpt_zh: 胸口猛然压下一股力量，像一只看不见的手狠狠按住我。它将我死死钉在那里几秒钟，沉重得无法挣脱，随后又在一瞬间全部松开。

part1_trials.excerpt: It felt like something warm and liquid was flowing down my arm, though nothing was there. A smooth, slow trickle from shoulder to fingertips.
part1_trials.excerpt_zh: 感觉像有什么温热的液体正顺着我的手臂往下流，然而那里其实什么也没有。那股流动平滑而稳定，像温水从肩头缓缓浇下，一路淌到手腕。

part1_trials.excerpt: Sudden pressure on my chest, like an invisible hand pressing down hard. It held me there for a few seconds before lifting.
